prompt: In image 1, place the pink and yellow crewmates from image 2 (pink crewmates in the center and yellow one in the bottom right) standing on the doorway next to each other, and replace the top-left crate with the yellow warning sign from image 3. Ensure visual consistency and correct scaling.
